page.title: Frontier Image Models — Side by Side
page.description: One standard prompt set across photorealism, text rendering, diagrams, people, and style range.

prompts.text: A photorealistic empty city street at blue-hour dusk, wet asphalt reflecting neon signage, 35mm.
A bakery storefront whose sign clearly reads 'MORNING LOAF — open at six', crisp legible lettering.
A clean labeled diagram of the water cycle with arrows and readable labels, flat vector style.
A natural candid portrait of an older mechanic in a garage, soft window light, realistic skin and hands.
Three coworkers laughing around a laptop in an open office, varied ages and ethnicities, natural poses.
A quiet coastal village rendered as a loose watercolor, visible paper texture and soft bleeds.
An isometric cutaway of a tiny coffee shop, clean 3D, warm palette, soft ambient occlusion.
A minimalist concert poster reading 'NIGHT SHIFT / FRIDAY / 9PM', strong type hierarchy.
